articles.title: Trump Reads Iran's Secret 14-Point Plan to End the War
articles.summary: President Trump is looking at a new 14-point plan from Iran to stop the fighting. A ceasefire (when both sides pause the war) has lasted three weeks. But a famous Nobel Peace Prize winner in Iran is very sick in prison.

articles.title: A Girl Power First at the Kentucky Derby!
articles.summary: Golden Tempo, a horse with 23-1 odds, won the Kentucky Derby! His trainer, Cherie DeVaux, is the first woman ever to train a Derby winner. She says she's a role model for girls who dream big.

articles.title: When Navies Block the Way: The Strait of Hormuz and Other Big Blockades
articles.summary: The Strait of Hormuz is blocked, stopping about one-fifth of the world's oil. But naval blockades have been used for centuries. From Gaza to Cuba, here are some famous ones that changed history.
